mapper.select: SELECT u.*, r.id as role_id, r.name as role_name, r.remark as role_remark FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.user_name = #{username} AND u.delete_flag = 0

SELECT u.*, r.id as role_id, r.name as role_name, r.remark as role_remark FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.delete_flag = 0

SELECT u.*, r.id as role_id, r.name as role_name, r.remark as role_remark FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.delete_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET user_name = #{userName}, mobile = #{mobile}, image = #{image}, status = #{status}, password = #{password}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
